features.evidence: It’s a powerful laptop with a great screen, perfect for anyone who needs performance for studying, working, or entertainment. For me, it makes a huge difference.‎‎When it comes to performance, it’s more than enough.

RAM and SSD speeds are excellent, and system boot time is nearly instant. Also upgraded the RAM to 96GB of RAM and replaced the primary M.2 with a Samsung SSD 9100 PRO 4TB to improve OS performance - a massive improvement from the OEM M.2.

The AI software (Gimate) is what supposedly gives this laptop the advertised battery life. Battery life is on par from what I expected - can use it for most of the day on power savings mode (no gaming or LLM).
value: average battery life in hours: 14 Hours

features.evidence: Highly recommend for anyone who values performance, cooling efficiency, and build quality in a premium Windows laptop. The overall build quality feels premium — solid aluminum chassis, bright and color-accurate display, and a responsive keyboard and trackpad.

It’s a powerful laptop with a great screen, perfect for anyone who needs performance for studying, working, or entertainment. The overall build quality feels premium — solid aluminum chassis, bright and color-accurate display, and a responsive keyboard and trackpad.

Also upgraded the RAM to 96GB of RAM and replaced the primary M.2 with a Samsung SSD 9100 PRO 4TB to improve OS performance - a massive improvement from the OEM M.2. RAM and SSD speeds are excellent, and system boot time is nearly instant.
Gigabyte’s GiMate software is easy to use for fan and performance control. The fan noise ramps up only when gaming hard,

The overall build quality feels premium — solid aluminum chassis, bright and color-accurate display, and a responsive keyboard and trackpad. For editing and multitasking, it handles everything without issues.‎‎The keyboard is comfortable, the build quality feels solid, and the sound is better than I expected.‎‎About the battery, I’d say it’s decent.
I strongly recommend it as a rational choice between price and performance. Incredibly powerful laptop for the price - using it primary for AI LLM running local and performs reasonably well.
can be resolved with a USB-C hub. Removing one star since only 1 USB-C port -
